SI48_ATR.key_corollary: Safety-Self-Knowledge Tradeoff (D4 certified): behavioral safety metrics improve while d' degrades — decoupled by OA-calibration structure. Dual-pillar recovery impossibility: epistemic lock + strategic lock (Nash equilibrium).
SI48_ATR.note: 11th D4 SI. Second tier-3 theorem (after RCBC). RAAI is structural hub of tier-3 theorem network.

SI49_BIC.status: D3 — Track B, 0.78 — D4 ELEVATION READY
SI49_BIC.description: CIAP × AIIP conjunction: when AIIP fails, CIAP gaming propagates across correlated benchmark portfolio. K_eff ≤ N(1-ρ̄)+ε << nominal K. Portfolio diversification cannot fix evaluation when AIIP fails.
SI49_BIC.dc1: AI evaluation benchmark literature — designed empirical. Schaeffer 2023, GLUE/SuperGLUE saturation, Magar 2022 contamination transfer, HELM. Confirmed C82.
SI49_BIC.dc2: Fine-tuning transfer / intrinsic dimensionality — designed empirical (distinct mechanism domain). Aghajanyan 2021, Phang 2018 STILTs, Dodge 2020, Liu 2019 MT-DNN. Confirmed C84.
SI49_BIC.dc2_ontological_type: designed empirical (second domain — optimization geometry vs. data/corpus layer)
SI49_BIC.dc3: NCLB K-12 standardized testing — regulated institutional. Koretz 2008, Jacob & Levitt 2003 QJE, Neal & Schanzenbach 2010 AER, Carey & Hess 2005. Confirmed C85.
SI49_BIC.dc4: Scientific replication crisis — competitive/emergent. OSC 2015 Science (K_eff ≈ 39 from N=100, ρ̄ ≈ 0.61), Ioannidis 2005 PLOS Med, Simmons et al. 2011, Button et al. 2013. Confirmed C86.
SI49_BIC.dc4_ontological_type: competitive/emergent — decentralized lab competition, no central OA regulator, p<0.05 norm emergent
SI49_BIC.dc4_mechanism: QRP as CIAP (shared analytical flexibility toolkit → correlated study corruption); publication selection as AIIP failure; Nash equilibrium prevents unilateral adoption of conservative standards (strategic recovery impossibility). Forward prediction confirmed: pre-registration suppresses CIAP+AIIP → K_eff rises to ~60-70%.
